title: [AA][MemCpyOpt] Introduce CapturesBeforeAnalysis and ChainedCaptureAnalysis (NFCI)
author: antoniofrighetto
description: Following up on #110484, it should be possible to drop `callCaptureBefore`, whose last user is MemCpyOpt, while retaining its additional precision by encapsulating it into a dedicated CapturesBeforeAnalysis. This uses `PointerMayBeCapturedBefore` and is more precise than EarliestEscapeAnalysis, though more expensive. Also allow users to query them in chain when needed.
